# Fieldnotes Template

Use fieldnotes for optional local observations that are useful during development but are not canonical project documentation.

## Purpose
- Capture observations while a round is in progress.
- Preserve short experiments, UI notes, and handoff hints that may later become docs.
- Keep private learnings out of public git.

## Local Path

`~/.ucore/memory/uCore/fieldnotes.md`

## Promotion Rule

Promote stable, shareable knowledge into `docs/`, `CONTEXT.md`, or a relevant spec. Keep personal notes and machine-specific findings local.
